response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable contributions to developer tooling and open-source projects, but lacks explicit, recent experience with Java/Kotlin IDE tooling, Spring, or JVM internals — key requirements for this role. His DLang and TypeScript focus, while impressive, doesn't directly align with the enterprise JVM tooling focus.
strengths: Strong open-source contributions with developer tooling projects (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, GISCollective)
Proven ability to work across stacks and languages with deep systems understanding
Experience building IDE-like tools (NI LabWindows/CVI) and organizing technical workshops
concerns: No recent or demonstrable work on Java/Kotlin IDE features or JVM tooling
Minimal evidence of Spring, Hibernate, or application server integration experience
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not JVM ecosystems
